{{Quote|Whatever they're ''really'' up to-- our being ''dead'' plays too ''important'' a part to suit ''me!''|Han Solo|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 19">[[Star Wars (1977) 19|''Star Wars'' (1977) 19]]</ref>}}
'''''Star Wars 19: The Ultimate Gamble''''' is the nineteenth issue in the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] series of comics.

==Plot summary==
The crew of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] have split up aboard the gambler's paradise known as [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]]. While the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] take the unconscious [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to the Wheel's medical center, the Wheel's administrator [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]] arranges to have [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] brought to his quarters. And [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], having made his way to the [[Crimson Casino]] on the Wheel's upper level, is captured by members of the [[Wheel Security Force]] and forced to enter [[The Big Game]]. In the meantime, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] is also entered into The Big Game, not knowing that Chewbacca too is a contestant in the gladiatorial event. This has all been arranged by Greyshade, who is working out a deal with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zertik Strom/Legends|Strom]] to have all of the Rebels meet an untimely end on the condition that Leia be allowed to stay with Greyshade on the Wheel.
